multimedia.alt: Across both markets, established luxury clients are the most frequent resale shoppers, challenging the perception that resale is primarily driven by budget-conscious shoppers.

fullArticle:
Resale is often perceived as the domain of budget-conscious shoppers, but new research reveals that higher-spending luxury clients are the most engaged secondhand shoppers.
